rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee declarations inside annex agree blocks scoped to component types for interface behavior
Use visible identifiers from the component type scope for assume/guarantee expressions
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid with proper labeling and expression structure
Constants and equations in AGREE should use type-safe declarations matching AADL data types
Assignments in AGREE are scoped to implementation-level annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-specific assignments in component type annexes
Avoid referencing AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time directly in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
Model fusion and architecture redesign patterns
